sections.title: Without an M'speak amulet and before completion of Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, monkey!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Eeek! Eeek! Ook!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have no idea what you just said, but good luck with it anyway!

sections.title: With an M'speak amulet or after completion of Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey monkey, your mother was an inedible seaweed sandwich!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Oh man, oh, you did not just say that!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: The second I get up that tree I am going to pelt you with bitternuts until you are neck deep in them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh noes, my worst nightmare come true...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry for insulting you. Is there anything I can do to make it up to you?

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Hmmmm...well, you seem sincere, how about you hurry up and use me on the tree and we'll call it even.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, ok, sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey monkey, your mother was an inedible seaweed sandwich!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Oh man, oh, you did not just say that!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: The second I get up that tree I am going to pelt you with bitternuts until you are neck deep in them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh noes, my worst nightmare come true...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey monkey, take your time getting the nut ok?

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Sure. If I see any monkeys around the top of the tree I'll be careful and try and get you the nut whatever happens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, monkey!

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: What? Can I come out of this bag now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That depends, do you think you can reach those bitternuts for me?

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Sigh...yes. Just take me to the tree and I'll grab one for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey monkey, take your time getting the nut ok?

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Sure. If I see any monkeys around the top of the tree I'll be careful and try and get you the nut whatever happens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, never mind about taking your time, I'm sure things will be ok.

lines.speaker: Blue Monkey
lines.text: Well if you are sure. Ok, I'll get up there and pass you the nut then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cheers, I'll be nearby to catch it.
